title: Functools, Operator Functions, Caching, and Dispatch · Equational Recall
summary: Build reusable scoring functions without obscuring cache validity or dispatch behavior. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a measured callable utility and dispatch package after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use partial application to bind stable configuration without hiding required arguments.
Use cache and lru_cache only for hashable inputs with stable effect-free semantics.
Design singledispatch registrations around first-argument type contracts and safe fallbacks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')

# Extend one pure, lazy, tested pipeline increment per activity.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Partial Binding value-and-effect pipeline for this review task before implementing it.
